questions.q: What popular in-store customer perk did McDonald's quietly begin phasing out nationwide in May 2026 to modernize its restaurants?
On May 5, 2026, which major e-commerce platform announced it was reviewing a $56 billion 'unsolicited' acquisition offer from GameStop?
According to a May 2026 study, White Americans who regularly get their political news from which network show much higher levels of support for the Great Replacement Theory?
What new software platform did IBM announce the general availability of on May 5, 2026, designed to help organizations build AI-ready sovereign environments?
On May 4, 2026, Elon Musk agreed to pay $1.5 million to settle an SEC lawsuit regarding delayed disclosures during his 2022 buyout of which company?
Which major national Statistics Canada data collection initiative officially went live across the country on May 5, 2026?
Days before the annual Victory Day parade in 2026, a Ukrainian drone reportedly hit a luxury high-rise residential building located just miles from the Kremlin in which city?
On May 4, 2026, the White House press room and North Lawn were evacuated following an armed suspect's shootout with which agency near the National Mall?
A May 2026 psychology study found that modern German viewers felt less guilt about Holocaust atrocities when images were mixed with smiling photographs of which historical figure?
At its annual 'Think 2026' conference on May 5, which tech giant announced the next generation of its 'watsonx Orchestrate' for multi-agent AI orchestration?
